overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a neon-lit dystopian city street at night. The player walks through elevated walkways, covered market areas, and narrow alleys with heavy atmospheric haze and wet reflective surfaces. The environment features a mix of high-tech neon signage, industrial elements, and traditional Japanese architectural details.

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated metal walkway with railings, observing the neon-lit street below

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and 'KARAOKE' text in pink and white
red metal safety railing along the elevated walkway edge
massive circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on the concrete wall
purple neon hotel sign visible in the distance above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking a neon-lit cyberpunk street. Large industrial ventilation fans are mounted on the right wall, while a tall vertical karaoke sign glows in the distance. The atmosphere is hazy with wet reflective surfaces, and the camera moves steadily forward along the balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market plaza with food stalls

events.description: turns right from open balcony into covered walkway with green support pillars

agents.ego_description: navigating through a covered plaza area with green pillars, passing by pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: woman with pink hair standing near a food stall table
police officer in uniform standing near a digital screen

entered.detail: thick green painted concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
pink neon sign reading 'WATSON WHORE' on the back wall
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
folding tables and chairs set up for street food vendors

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered market plaza supported by green pillars. The 'WATSON WHORE' neon sign glows pink against the back wall while pedestrians mill about near food stall tables. Large ventilation fans from the previous area are now visible in the background as the camera moves deeper into the covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with police presence and vending machines

events.description: descends ramp from covered walkway down to street level
passes parked NCPD police cars with flashing blue lights

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp to street level, then proceeding past police vehicles and food vendors

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress working at a food preparation counter

entered.detail: futuristic police sedan with 'NCPD' and 'POLICE' illuminated in blue on the sides
row of automated vending machines with 'BURRITO XXL' branding and food displays
large black truck with yellow biohazard symbols and warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level, revealing parked NCPD police cars with glowing blue livery. A row of burrito vending machines lines the right side while a large biohazard waste truck occupies the left. The environment opens up to the night sky with wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with traditional Japanese architectural elements

events.description: passes through traditional Japanese gate with red paper lanterns into a wider street
looks upward at towering skyscrapers with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street, crossing the road, and looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in cowboy hat and vest walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wooden gate structure with tiled roof marking the entrance to a commercial district
traditional Japanese paper lanterns with black Japanese characters hanging from the gate
massive illuminated towers disappearing into the hazy night sky with various neon advertisements
multiple layered neon signs and holographic advertisements covering building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a main commercial street featuring a traditional Japanese gate with glowing red paper lanterns. The camera crosses the street while pedestrians walk in opposing directions, then tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers towering overhead. Dense neon signage and holographic billboards illuminate the hazy night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley leading to drainage canal

events.description: approaches the edge of a drainage canal with polluted water and debris

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alleyway and stopping at the edge of a drainage canal to look down at the water

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the canal edge

entered.detail: concrete drainage channel with murky water, debris, and tires visible at the bottom
weathered concrete park benches along the alley wall
silver metal safety rails lining the edge of the canal drop-off
large yellow and purple industrial utility structure with warning symbols

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow back alley with lower lighting levels. The camera approaches a drainage canal with metal guard rails, looking down at the polluted water and debris below. Concrete benches line the left wall while a yellow utility box stands on the right, creating a claustrophobic ending to the urban exploration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated industrial walkway down into the dense, neon-saturated depths of a dystopian city. It begins by gliding along a concrete balcony past massive ventilation fans and a glowing karaoke sign, before transitioning into a covered market plaza where pink neon signage illuminates pedestrians and food stalls. The camera then descends to street level, moving past glowing NCPD police cars and burrito vending machines onto wet asphalt that reflects the surrounding city lights. This open urban space expands further as the camera crosses a main commercial street beneath a traditional Japanese gate and red lanterns, tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. Finally, the scene shifts away from the bright commercial hub into a dim, narrow back alley, ending with a view of a polluted drainage canal and concrete benches.
